title: Add session slug matching for `session` command
close_reason: Slug matching now uses case-insensitive substring match and returns most recent session when multiple share a slug. Dashboard by-slug endpoint updated with same logic.

title: Add daily/hourly token burn rate to summary
close_reason: Added hourly burn rate to summary: active hours, avg tokens/hour, peak hour. Computed from per-turn timestamps. Added to CLI, JSON, API, and dashboard summary page.

title: Build `timeline` command for concurrent session visualization
close_reason: Implemented timeline CLI command with ASCII Gantt, dashboard page with interactive Gantt/concurrency/burn-rate charts, and /api/v1/timeline endpoint. Token attribution uses per-turn timestamps to avoid false burn during idle gaps.

title: Build test fixtures from real session data
Differentiate same-slug sessions in watch view
description:
When Claude Code switches from plan mode to implementation (or resumes), it creates a new JSONL file but reuses the same slug. The watch view (both CLI and dashboard) then shows multiple rows with identical session names but different token counts, turns, and cache values. The older session is effectively dead but there's no way to tell.

## Options to explore

1. **Session ID prefix** — show a short UUID prefix alongside the slug (e.g., `delegated-waddling-bird (abc1)` vs `delegated-waddling-bird (def2)`)
2. **Start time column** — add session start time to disambiguate same-slug sessions
3. **Sequence number** — append an auto-incrementing number when multiple sessions share a slug (e.g., `delegated-waddling-bird #1`, `#2`)
4. **Dim/collapse stale sessions** — visually subordinate sessions that haven't changed for longer than active_window (still listed but greyed out or collapsed)
5. **Hybrid** — combine approaches, e.g. dim stale + show start time on hover in dashboard

## Context

Observed in CLI watch output:

```
| personal/agentsight | delegated-waddling-bird | 21,574,039 | 262 | 98.2% | idle 2m 54s |
| personal/agentsight | delegated-waddling-bird |  1,624,873 |  36 | 81.1% | active      |
```

The first row is from the plan mode session (never coming back), the second is the active implementation session.

## Applies to

- `agentsight watch` CLI command
- Dashboard watch page (SSE-based)
- Dashboard sessions list (less critical since sorted by date)
close_reason: Watch CLI and dashboard disambiguate same-slug sessions with short ID prefix. Dashboard watch adds Started column.

title: Add `--sort tokens` to sessions command
close_reason: Already implemented: sessions command has --sort tokens via SortField::Tokens

title: Implement JSON output for `summary` command
close_reason: Already implemented: summary command has --json flag and JSON output path

title: Config file first-run experience
close_reason: Creates ~/.agentsight/config.toml with commented defaults on first run. Explains billing mode and model pricing overrides.

title: Handle `<synthetic>` model gracefully
close_reason: Parser filters <synthetic> from per-turn model data. shorten_model maps it to unknown as safety net in both CLI and dashboard.
